welcome:
🤖 **Welcome to AI Bot Factory!**

I am your Bot Manager. Use the buttons below to create and manage your personalized AI clones.
error_occurred: An error occurred while processing your request.
help_message:
**Bot Factory Help:**

/start - Open Main Menu
/link - Create a new AI bot
/mybots - List all your bots
/setapi - Set Groq API Keys
/setprompt `@bot` <text> - Set bot persona
/lang - Change language
my_bots_msg:
**Your Managed Bots:**
Click the buttons below to open your AI clones:
no_bots_msg: You don't have any bots yet. Click **Create Bot**.
set_api_instruction:
**API Key Setup**

Your current API keys: 
`%s`

**Please reply by typing your new Groq API keys directly.**
You can use multiple keys by separating them with commas (e.g., `key1,key2`).

Press **Cancel** to abort.
api_saved: ✅ Your API keys have been securely encrypted and saved to the database.
missing_api_key: ⚠️ The owner of this bot hasn't set up their Groq API Keys yet. Please contact the owner.
create_bot_instruction: Click the button below to start creating your managed bot:
api_tutorial_steps:
Follow these simple steps:

1. Visit the **Groq Console** by clicking the button below.
2. Login using your Google or GitHub account.
3. Click the **"Create API Key"** button.
4. Give it a name (e.g., "My Bot") and click **Submit**.
5. **Copy** the key (starts with `gsk_...`).
6. Come back here and **paste** the key in this chat.
limit_reached:
⚠️ **Bot Limit Reached**

You have created the maximum of %d free bots.

Upgrade to Premium using **Telegram Stars** to create unlimited bots and support this project!
premium_success:
✅ **Payment Successful!**

Thank you! You are now a Premium user. You can now create unlimited bots.
premium_features_list:
By upgrading to Premium, you will get:

• **Unlimited Bot Creation**: No more 5-bot limit.
• **Faster Response**: Priority processing for AI.
• **Priority Support**: Access to new features first.
• **Ad-Free**: A cleaner management experience.
premium_invoice_desc: Unlock unlimited bots and premium features for %d days.
chat_cleared:
🧹 **Memory Cleared!**

I have forgotten our previous conversation. I'm ready for a new topic! What's on your mind?
